case_title: CALIFORNIA BANK AND TRUST VS. MARK LUSSIER

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-12-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF MARTIN D. GOODMAN RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DUE DILIGENCE WITH RESPECT TO SERVICE ON DFNDT MARK LUSSIER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BANK AND TRUST

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-12-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-27-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
